completed_tasks.name: Label types upgraded to LocalizedText (PathContribution, ThemeContribution, MeshProvidesDeclaration, BackendProviderNode)
Module-scoped catalog loading wired through discovery → runtime
Debug snapshot expanded with provider/theme labels (provides_interface_labels, provides_themes, provides_theme_labels)
All tests passing (118 module tests, locale tests, surface-config tests)

remaining_tasks.name: Mark todo.md items complete for the two finished slices
Settings UI labels — schema description fields in settings JSON blob; convention-only for now (serde_json::Value, can't type directly)
Make event channels typed and declared (undeclared_interface_event_emit already for backends; frontend side remains)
Eliminate service-specific Rust branches (audio optimistic state etc.)

decisions.decision: PathContribution/ThemeContribution/MeshProvidesDeclaration.label changed to Option<LocalizedText> — backwards compatible since LocalizedText deserializes from plain strings too
decisions.rationale: Consistent with LayoutContribution.label and KeybindAction.label; enables locale-resolved display in settings UI

decisions.decision: Module-scoped catalogs also merged into global pool (load_module_translations calls load_translations internally)
decisions.rationale: Preserves backward compat for t() in templates; scoped lookup just checks module bucket first before falling back to global

decisions.decision: redundant_supported_locales emitted as advisory — not hard error — so existing modules with both mesh.i18n.supportedLocales and provides.i18n still load
decisions.rationale: Clean migration path without breaking ships

decisions.decision: Settings schema description labels (in serde_json::Value blob) deferred — convention note only
decisions.rationale: Schema is a raw serde_json::Value; typing it would require a full schema DSL redesign; the settings UI is not yet built

next_action: Update todo.md to mark the two completed items ([x]) for 'Resolve localized manifest metadata...' and 'Let modules declare supported locales...', then commit all uncommitted files
context_notes: Working through todo.md module system redesign items. The two i18n/locale items are now fully implemented. Next items in the list are event channel typing and eliminating service-specific Rust branches. All 118 module tests pass. Shell lib compiles cleanly (smithay-client-toolkit pkg-config is missing in this environment but that's an env issue, not a code issue).
